name: The Weak Do Not Have the Right to Choose How They Die!!!

issues.description: K.O. action missing required condition: target must be rested. Card text states 'K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's rested Characters' but DSL has no 'isRested' condition on the KO action.
Unexplained second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and GiveDon action has no basis in card text. Card contains only Rest and K.O. effects; no Don-granting effect exists.
Rest action should specify 'up to 1' via maxCount or similar limiter; currently appears unrestricted.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main]/[Counter] Rest up to 1 of your opponent's Leader or Character cards. Then, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's rested Characters with a cost of 6 or less.
